backend.changelog: Clean SolidWorks session at Generate: a leftover root assembly from a previous session is evicted (with consent when it has unsaved changes), and after each run SolidWorks is left with no documents open so they no longer accumulate across BOM switches.

cadBridge.changelog: Pre-launch orphan sweep (clears a leftover SolidWorks process that would block a fresh launch) and end-of-run unload, so the agent leaves SolidWorks with no documents open after a generate run.
